source_jobs.title: Software Engineer - Backend
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT ARTIAN

Artian AI is building agentic AI automation for financial services. Our platform enables reliable, autonomous AI agents to execute business-critical workflows across regulated enterprise environments.

We are an in-person team in New York, building at the intersection of AI, enterprise software, workflow automation, and financial services. We move with urgency, take ownership, communicate transparently, and care deeply about doing excellent work. We are looking for people who are grounded under pressure, learn quickly, earn trust with teammates and customers, and want to help define how AI agents are deployed safely and effectively in the enterprise.


About the Role

Artian AI is looking for a Software Engineer - Backend to help build the platform infrastructure behind our agentic AI automation product. You will work on the services, APIs, data models, orchestration systems, integrations, and reliability foundations that enable AI agents to operate inside enterprise financial-services environments.

This role is ideal for an engineer who enjoys building production software, cares about reliability and clean abstractions, and wants to work closely with AI, product, and customer-facing teams to ship meaningful functionality quickly.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build backend services, APIs, workflows, and platform primitives for Artian’s AI automation platform.

 - Design systems for orchestration, state management, permissions, observability, and integration with enterprise systems.

 - Work closely with AI/ML engineers to expose model and agent capabilities through robust production services.

 - Build secure, scalable data flows across customer workflows and internal platform components.

 - Improve platform reliability, performance, testing, deployment, and developer velocity.

 - Collaborate with product and solutions engineering to turn customer requirements into reusable platform capabilities.

 - Debug and resolve issues across the stack in a fast-moving production environment.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Strong Python engineering skills and experience building backend systems in production.

 - Experience designing APIs, services, data models, queues, jobs, workflow engines, or distributed systems.

 - Familiarity with databases, cloud infrastructure, observability, testing, and deployment practices.

 - Ability to write clean, maintainable, well-tested code.

 - Strong product sense and an interest in building systems that customers rely on.

 - High ownership, clear communication, and comfort operating in ambiguity.
   
   


NICE TO HAVE

 - BS in Computer Science or a closely related engineering discipline, or equivalent industry experience.

 - Experience building enterprise SaaS, workflow automation, developer platforms, or data-intensive systems.

 - Experience integrating with financial-services systems, document systems, CRMs, ERPs, or other enterprise tools.

 - Experience with AI/ML platforms, LLM applications, or agent orchestration systems.

 - Experience in security-conscious or regulated environments.




WHY JOIN ARTIAN

 - Build the core platform for deploying autonomous agents in real enterprise workflows.

 - Work closely with AI engineers and customer-facing teams on high-impact product problems.

 - Join an in-person New York team with high ownership and direct customer feedback.

 - Help define the backend architecture for a new category of enterprise AI software.

source_jobs.title: Product Marketing Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT ARTIAN

Artian AI is building agentic AI automation for financial services. Our platform enables reliable, autonomous AI agents to execute business-critical workflows across regulated enterprise environments.

We are an in-person team in New York, building at the intersection of AI, enterprise software, workflow automation, and financial services. We move with urgency, take ownership, communicate transparently, and care deeply about doing excellent work. We are looking for people who are grounded under pressure, learn quickly, earn trust with teammates and customers, and want to help define how AI agents are deployed safely and effectively in the enterprise.




ABOUT THE ROLE

Artian AI is looking for a Product Marketing Manager to define how we communicate the value of agentic AI automation to financial-services enterprises. You will drive positioning, messaging, launch strategy, sales enablement, competitive intelligence, and customer storytelling for Artian’s platform.

This role is ideal for a product marketer who can understand complex enterprise workflows, translate technical capabilities into crisp business value, and create materials that help customers, executives, operators, and technical stakeholders understand why Artian matters. You should be comfortable working across product, sales, solutions, delivery, engineering, and company leadership in a fast-moving startup environment.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Drive positioning and messaging for Artian’s agentic AI automation platform.

 - Translate technical product capabilities into clear narratives for financial-services buyers, operators, executives, and technical stakeholders.

 - Develop sales enablement materials including pitch decks, one-pagers, battlecards, product explainers, demo narratives, ROI stories, and customer-facing collateral.

 - Partner with product and solutions teams to understand workflows, use cases, customer pain points, and implementation patterns.

 - Lead go-to-market planning for product launches, new capabilities, customer use cases, and vertical-specific offerings.

 - Build customer stories, case studies, proof points, and value narratives that demonstrate measurable operational impact.

 - Conduct market, buyer, and competitive research across financial services, enterprise AI, workflow automation, and agentic AI categories.

 - Support demand generation, website messaging, thought leadership, events, and executive communications.

 - Create internal messaging frameworks that keep sales, product, solutions, and leadership aligned.

 - Help define and refine Artian’s category narrative as the market for enterprise AI agents evolves.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Product marketing experience in enterprise software, fintech, AI/ML products, automation, data platforms, or workflow software.

 - Strong ability to turn complex technical products into clear, differentiated, buyer-relevant messaging.

 - Excellent writing, storytelling, and communication skills.

 - Experience creating sales enablement materials and working directly with sales or go-to-market teams.

 - Strong customer empathy and ability to understand operational pain points in enterprise environments.

 - Comfort working with technical teams and translating product details into business outcomes.

 - Ability to operate independently, move quickly, and create structure in ambiguity.

 - Strong judgment around messaging, positioning, audience segmentation, and commercial priorities.
   
   


NICE TO HAVE

 - BA/MBA in Marketing, or equivalent financial services industry experience.

 - Experience marketing to banks, insurers, asset managers, fintechs, or other financial-services institutions.

 - Experience with AI, LLMs, agentic AI, workflow automation, RPA, decisioning, analytics, or enterprise data products.

 - Experience building product marketing from an early stage or working as the first product marketing hire.

 - Familiarity with regulated enterprise buying pro

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer - Backend
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT ARTIAN

Artian AI is building agentic AI automation for financial services. Our platform enables reliable, autonomous AI agents to execute business-critical workflows across regulated enterprise environments.

We are an in-person team in New York, building at the intersection of AI, enterprise software, workflow automation, and financial services. We move with urgency, take ownership, communicate transparently, and care deeply about doing excellent work. We are looking for people who are grounded under pressure, learn quickly, earn trust with teammates and customers, and want to help define how AI agents are deployed safely and effectively in the enterprise.




ABOUT THE ROLE

Artian AI is looking for a Senior Software Engineer - Backend to lead development of the core platform behind our agentic AI automation product. You will design and build the backend systems that allow autonomous agents to execute business-critical workflows reliably, securely, and at enterprise scale.

This is a senior individual contributor role for an engineer who can own major technical decisions, raise engineering standards, and translate ambiguous product and customer needs into durable backend architecture.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Lead design and implementation of backend architecture for Artian’s AI automation platform.

 - Build scalable services, APIs, orchestration systems, workflow engines, data models, and integration layers.

 - Design platform primitives for permissions, state, auditability, observability, reliability, and enterprise deployment.

 - Partner with AI/ML engineers to productionize agent capabilities and support complex AI-driven workflows.

 - Own major backend workstreams from technical design through implementation, launch, and iteration.

 - Improve engineering practices around testing, monitoring, code quality, deployment, and incident response.

 - Mentor engineers and help establish technical standards for a high-performing engineering team.

 - Make pragmatic architecture decisions that balance speed, correctness, reliability, and long-term maintainability.
   
   


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Significant backend engineering experience with a record of shipping production systems.

 - Deep Python experience and strong software architecture fundamentals.

 - Experience designing APIs, distributed systems, workflow systems, data platforms, or enterprise SaaS infrastructure.

 - Strong understanding of databases, asynchronous processing, observability, cloud infrastructure, security, and system reliability.

 - Ability to own ambiguous technical problems and drive them to high-quality outcomes.

 - Strong communication skills and the ability to collaborate across engineering, product, and customer-facing teams.

 - A high bar for engineering quality and a bias toward building simple, robust systems.
   
   


NICE TO HAVE

 - MS in Computer Science or a closely related engineering discipline, or equivalent industry experience.
   
   Experience building enterprise SaaS, workflow automation platforms, developer platforms, or mission-critical systems.

 - Experience with AI/ML infrastructure, LLM applications, agent orchestration, or data-intensive automation.

 - Experience with financial services, regulated environments, auditability, compliance, or security-sensitive systems.

 - Experience at an early-stage company where senior engineers shape architecture and culture.
   
   


WHY JOIN ARTIAN

 - Own foundational architecture for enterprise-grade autonomous agents.

 - Build systems that must be reliable, observable, secure, and scalable from day one.

 - Work in a high-ownership environment with direct influence on product and engineering direction.

 - Help define the platform layer for agentic AI in financial services.

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer - AI/ML
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT ARTIAN

Artian AI is building agentic AI automation for financial services. Our platform enables reliable, autonomous AI agents to execute business-critical workflows across regulated enterprise environments.

We are an in-person team in New York, building at the intersection of AI, enterprise software, workflow automation, and financial services. We move with urgency, take ownership, communicate transparently, and care deeply about doing excellent work. We are looking for people who are grounded under pressure, learn quickly, earn trust with teammates and customers, and want to help define how AI agents are deployed safely and effectively in the enterprise.


About the Role

Artian AI is looking for a Software Engineer - AI/ML to help build the intelligence layer of our agentic AI platform for financial services. You will work on the systems that enable AI agents to understand complex workflows, reason over enterprise data, interact with tools, and complete business-critical tasks reliably.

This role is ideal for an engineer who has strong software fundamentals, applied machine learning experience, and a practical orientation toward shipping production systems. You should be excited by the challenge of turning fast-moving AI capabilities into dependable software used by financial institutions.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build and improve AI/ML components that power autonomous enterprise workflows.

 - Work with large language models, embeddings, retrieval systems, classifiers, ranking systems, and agentic workflow architectures.

 - Develop evaluation frameworks to measure agent performance, accuracy, reliability, latency, and failure modes.

 - Prototype new AI capabilities and productionize the ones that create customer value.

 - Collaborate with backend, product, and solutions engineering to integrate AI capabilities into end-to-end workflows.

 - Design systems for observability, debugging, and continuous improvement of AI agents in production.

 - Stay current with developments in applied AI and bring a pragmatic lens to which techniques should be used in enterprise environments.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Strong Python engineering skills and experience building production software.

 - Experience with applied machine learning, LLMs, NLP, embeddings, retrieval, ranking, or agentic systems.

 - Familiarity with ML tooling such as PyTorch, scikit-learn, vector databases, model evaluation frameworks, or data pipelines.

 - Ability to reason from first principles about model behavior, failure modes, latency, accuracy, and reliability.

 - Comfort working in ambiguity and quickly turning prototypes into robust software.

 - Strong communication skills and a bias toward ownership.
   
   


NICE TO HAVE

 - BS in Computer Science, AI/ML, or a closely related technical field, or equivalent industry experience.

 - Experience building LLM-powered products, agent frameworks, or retrieval-augmented generation systems.

 - Experience with financial services, regulated workflows, compliance, auditability, or enterprise data environments.

 - Experience designing AI evaluations, human-in-the-loop systems, or production monitoring for ML systems.

 - Experience at an early-stage startup or in a high-ownership engineering environment.




WHY JOIN ARTIAN

 - Build applied AI systems for real enterprise use cases, not demos.

 - Work on hard problems in reliability, automation, financial services, and AI governance.

 - Join an in-person team with high ownership and direct customer impact.

 - Help define how autonomous agents operate in regulated enterprise environments.

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer - Solutions
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT ARTIAN

Artian AI is building agentic AI automation for financial services. Our platform enables reliable, autonomous AI agents to execute business-critical workflows across regulated enterprise environments.

We are an in-person team in New York, building at the intersection of AI, enterprise software, workflow automation, and financial services. We move with urgency, take ownership, communicate transparently, and care deeply about doing excellent work. We are looking for people who are grounded under pressure, learn quickly, earn trust with teammates and customers, and want to help define how AI agents are deployed safely and effectively in the enterprise.


About the Role

Artian AI is looking for a Software Engineer - Solutions to help turn customer workflows into production AI automation. You will work directly with enterprise customers, product teams, and engineering teams to understand operational problems, design technical solutions, build prototypes, and support successful deployments.

This role is ideal for an engineer who enjoys writing code, working with customers, solving ambiguous business problems, and operating at the intersection of product, engineering, and go-to-market.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Work with enterprise customers to understand workflows, data environments, integration needs, and success criteria.

 - Build prototypes, demos, internal tools, integrations, and implementation accelerators.

 - Partner with product and engineering to translate customer requirements into scalable platform capabilities.

 - Support deployment of Artian’s agentic AI platform in complex enterprise environments.

 - Debug technical issues across customer workflows, integrations, data pipelines, and platform behavior.

 - Create documentation, implementation playbooks, and repeatable patterns for customer deployments.

 - Serve as a technical bridge between customers, sales, product, and engineering.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Strong software engineering skills, especially in Python.

 - Experience building integrations, APIs, scripts, backend services, demos, or customer-facing technical solutions.

 - Ability to understand customer workflows and translate business requirements into technical designs.

 - Strong communication skills and comfort working directly with technical and non-technical stakeholders.

 - Ability to operate in ambiguity, move quickly, and maintain high standards.

 - Interest in AI, automation, financial services, and enterprise software.
   
   


NICE TO HAVE

 - BS in Computer Science, Engineering or a closely related engineering discipline, or equivalent industry experience.

 - Experience in solutions engineering, sales engineering, implementation engineering, technical consulting, or customer-facing engineering.

 - Experience with enterprise SaaS deployments, data integrations, workflow automation, or AI/ML products.

 - Experience in financial services, insurance, banking, risk, operations, or compliance workflows.

 - Experience building LLM-powered prototypes, agent workflows, or automation demos.




WHY JOIN ARTIAN

 - Work directly with customers on high-value enterprise AI deployments.

 - Build technical solutions that influence product direction and accelerate revenue.

 - Operate across engineering, product, and go-to-market in a high-ownership environment.

 - Help define what successful agentic AI deployment looks like in financial services.

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer - AI/ML
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT ARTIAN

Artian AI is building agentic AI automation for financial services. Our platform enables reliable, autonomous AI agents to execute business-critical workflows across regulated enterprise environments.

We are an in-person team in New York, building at the intersection of AI, enterprise software, workflow automation, and financial services. We move with urgency, take ownership, communicate transparently, and care deeply about doing excellent work. We are looking for people who are grounded under pressure, learn quickly, earn trust with teammates and customers, and want to help define how AI agents are deployed safely and effectively in the enterprise.




ABOUT THE ROLE

Artian AI is looking for a Senior Software Engineer - AI/ML to lead development of core AI systems for our agentic automation platform. You will help design, build, and scale the AI architecture that enables autonomous agents to perform complex, high-stakes work for financial services customers.

This is a senior individual contributor role for someone who can operate across research-informed prototyping, production engineering, evaluation, and system design. You will be expected to make high-leverage technical decisions, mentor other engineers, and drive AI/ML projects from ambiguous problem statements to reliable product capabilities.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Lead design and implementation of AI/ML systems that power autonomous financial-services workflows.

 - Architect agentic systems involving LLMs, retrieval, embeddings, tool use, planning, classification, ranking, and structured reasoning.

 - Translate customer and product needs into technical AI system designs that are reliable, auditable, and scalable.

 - Own major AI/ML workstreams from exploration through production deployment.

 - Partner closely with backend, product, and solutions teams to ensure AI capabilities are deeply integrated into the platform.

 - Mentor engineers on AI system design, experimentation, evaluation, and productionization.

 - Establish engineering standards for AI reliability, observability, safety, and maintainability.
   
   


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Deep Python engineering experience and a track record of shipping production systems.

 - Significant experience with applied ML, LLM systems, NLP, retrieval, embeddings, ranking, or agentic architectures.

 - Strong system-design skills and the ability to reason about tradeoffs across accuracy, latency, cost, reliability, and maintainability.

 - Experience building evaluation pipelines, offline and online metrics, model monitoring, or data feedback loops.

 - Ability to operate independently in ambiguous environments and drive complex projects to completion.

 - Strong technical judgment and the ability to distinguish promising AI techniques from fragile demos.

 - Clear communication and mentorship skills.
   
   


NICE TO HAVE

 - MS/PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, or a related technical field, or equivalent industry experience.

 - Experience with financial services, compliance, model risk management, auditability, or regulated enterprise workflows.

 - Experience at an early-stage company where senior engineers are expected to shape product and architecture.


WHY JOIN ARTIAN

 - Lead AI architecture for a category-defining enterprise automation platform.

 - Work on production agentic AI systems for complex, regulated customer environments.

source_jobs.title: Solutions Engineering Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT ARTIAN

Artian AI is building agentic AI automation for financial services. Our platform enables reliable, autonomous AI agents to execute business-critical workflows across regulated enterprise environments.

We are an in-person team in New York, building at the intersection of AI, enterprise software, workflow automation, and financial services. We move with urgency, take ownership, communicate transparently, and care deeply about doing excellent work. We are looking for people who are grounded under pressure, learn quickly, earn trust with teammates and customers, and want to help define how AI agents are deployed safely and effectively in the enterprise.




ABOUT THE ROLE

Artian AI is looking for a Solutions Engineering Manager to lead successful enterprise deployments of our agentic AI automation platform. You will own the delivery motion from customer discovery through implementation, launch, and expansion, ensuring that Artian’s solutions create measurable impact for financial-services customers.

This role sits at the intersection of customer success, solutions engineering, product, and implementation. You will be responsible for driving clarity, accountability, execution, and customer trust across complex deployments. The ideal candidate is highly organized, technically fluent, customer-facing, and comfortable operating in high-ambiguity enterprise environments.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own delivery of Artian deployments for enterprise financial-services customers from kickoff through launch and expansion.

 - Translate customer goals, workflows, constraints, and success metrics into clear implementation plans.

 - Coordinate across customers, solutions engineering, product, AI/ML, backend engineering, and go-to-market teams.

 - Manage project scope, timelines, risks, dependencies, stakeholder communication, and executive-level updates.

 - Develop implementation playbooks, delivery processes, customer onboarding materials, and repeatable deployment patterns.

 - Identify blockers early and drive cross-functional resolution.

 - Ensure customers realize measurable value from Artian’s agentic AI platform.

 - Capture product feedback and help prioritize improvements based on deployment learnings.

 - Build trust with customer stakeholders across business, technical, risk, compliance, and operations teams.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Experience managing complex enterprise software implementations, technical delivery programs, customer deployments, or professional services engagements.

 - Strong project management, stakeholder management, and executive communication skills.

 - Technical fluency across APIs, integrations, data workflows, SaaS platforms, AI/ML products, or enterprise systems.

 - Ability to understand complex customer workflows and translate them into structured implementation plans.

 - High ownership, excellent judgment, and comfort operating in fast-moving, ambiguous environments.

 - Ability to earn trust with both customers and internal engineering/product teams.

 - Strong written communication and documentation skills.
   
   


NICE TO HAVE

 - BS/MS in Computer Science, Engineering or a closely related technical discipline, or equivalent industry experience in enterprise software delivery, implementation, or solutions engineering.

 - Experience in financial services, banking, insurance, capital markets, risk, compliance, or operations.

 - Experience delivering AI/ML, automation, analytics, workflow, or data platform products.

 - Experience at an early-stage startup or in a high-growth enterprise software company.

 - Experience building customer implementation processes from the ground up.

 - Familiarity with governance, auditability, model risk, data lineage, or regulated enterprise deployments.




WHY JOIN ARTIAN

 - Lead deployment of production AI agents in complex, high-value enterprise environments.

 - Shape the customer delivery function for a fast-growing AI company.

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT ARTIAN

Artian AI is building agentic AI automation for financial services. Our platform enables reliable, autonomous AI agents to execute business-critical workflows across regulated enterprise environments.

We are an in-person team in New York, building at the intersection of AI, enterprise software, workflow automation, and financial services. We move with urgency, take ownership, communicate transparently, and care deeply about doing excellent work. We are looking for people who are grounded under pressure, learn quickly, earn trust with teammates and customers, and want to help define how AI agents are deployed safely and effectively in the enterprise.




ABOUT THE ROLE

Artian AI is looking for a Senior Product Manager to lead product development for the operational workflows our agentic AI platform automates. You will work deeply with customers, engineering, AI/ML, solutions, and go-to-market teams to understand how financial institutions actually operate, identify high-value automation opportunities, and translate complex workflows into reliable AI-powered product experiences.

This role is ideal for a product leader who has spent meaningful time inside financial services operations, enterprise workflow software, or highly regulated customer environments. You should be able to sit with operators, understand manual processes and control points, map workflows end to end, and turn those insights into product requirements that engineering teams can execute against.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own product strategy and execution for financial services operations workflows automated by Artian’s platform.

 - Work directly with customers to understand business processes, operational pain points, data flows, exception handling, approval paths, and success metrics.

 - Translate complex workflows into product requirements, user stories, workflow maps, acceptance criteria, and launch plans.

 - Partner with AI/ML and backend engineering to design agentic automation capabilities that are reliable, auditable, and enterprise-ready.

 - Collaborate with solutions engineering and delivery teams to identify repeatable patterns across customer deployments.

 - Prioritize product investments based on customer value, implementation complexity, risk, and strategic importance.

 - Define metrics for workflow automation quality, operational efficiency, user adoption, task completion, and customer ROI.

 - Build product feedback loops from pilots, deployments, customer usage, and internal implementation learnings.

 - Communicate product direction clearly to executives, customers, engineering, and go-to-market teams.

 - Help shape Artian’s product operating model as the company scales.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Significant product management experience in enterprise software, workflow automation, financial technology, AI products, or regulated industries.

 - Deep understanding of financial-services operations workflows such as banking operations, insurance operations, lending, onboarding, servicing, risk, compliance, claims, reconciliation, trade operations, or back-office processing.

 - Strong ability to map operational processes, identify automation opportunities, and translate messy real-world workflows into clear product requirements.

 - Technical fluency across APIs, data systems, enterprise integrations, AI/ML products, workflow platforms, or SaaS architecture.

 - Strong customer discovery, stakeholder management, and executive communication skills.

 - Ability to balance speed, customer specificity, product generality, reliability, and regulatory constraints.

 - High ownership, excellent judgment, and comfort operating in ambiguity.

 - Strong written communication and documentation skills.
   
   


NICE TO HAVE

 - MBA in Finance or Operations Research, BS/MS in Computer Science, or equivalent industry experience.

 - Experience building AI/ML, LLM, automation, decisioning, analytics, or workflow orchestration products.

notes: AI-focused startup with strong engineering core
